title: Evaluate a cleaner CLI implementation — language or structure
description: cli.js is messy and JS is friction. Consider a cleaner language or at least a cleaner implementation/structure for the Scaffolder CLI. Requires its own design grill → PRD before any rewrite (decision: stay-JS-cleaner vs port; weigh the npm/npx distribution constraint, the stamp/pointer/preflight contracts, and package-qa).
acceptance_criteria: a grill resolves language/structure direction with the npx-distribution constraint weighed
the chosen approach preserves the stamp + pointer + preflight contracts (package-qa still passes)
notes: Brooks directive 2026-06-08. Grill-first — macro, needs its own grill → PRD like EXEC-017.
